预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校（A类）。其华西医学中心历史悠久、实力雄厚，口腔医学、临床医学等学 科长期位居全国前列，在东北地区考生和家长中享有极高声誉，是辽宁省高分考生报考医学类院校的重要目标之一。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来全国范围内医学类专业报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。四川大学华西医学品牌效应显著，在辽宁省医学类招生规模适中（2026年仅22 人），属于小而精的招生模式，进一步加剧了优质专业的竞争。地域上，成都作为西南中心城市，生活宜居、经济发展活跃，对东北考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年四川大学在辽宁省医学类最低录取位次约为5618名，较2025年（6264名）有所前移（更容易录取），主要受招生计划缩减影响。 预计录取区间为5337至5899名，建议位次在此区间内的考生积极报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Sichuan University recruits separately for medical programs in Liaoning Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 17187, 4721, 6162, 6572, and 6264 respectively. The ranking in 2021 was abnormally high (17187), mainly due to the nursing program (minimum ranking 17187) lowering the overall threshold that year; after a significant rebound to 4721 in 2022, it stabilized in the 6100-6600 range from 2023 to 2025, showing slight fluctuations. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 25 students in 2021, 26 in 2022, 26 in 2023, expanded to 29 in 2024, reduced to 27 in 2025, and further reduced to 22 in 2026, a decrease of about 18.5% compared to 2025, a significant reduction. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the reduction in enrollment tends to decrease the ranking number (easier admission), but the recent continuous increase in the popularity of medical applications has partially offset the downward pressure from the reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Category A). Its West China Medical Center has a long history and strong strength, with disciplines such as stomatology and clinical medicine ranking among the top in the country for a long time. It enjoys a very high reputation among candidates and parents in Northeast China, making it an important target for high-scoring candidates in Liaoning Province applying for medical schools.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs nationwide has been continuously rising, with core programs such as clinical medicine and stomatology facing particularly fierce competition. The West China Medical brand of Sichuan University has a significant effect, and the scale of medical enrollment in Liaoning Province is moderate (only 22 in 2026), adopting a small but refined enrollment model, further intensifying competition for high-quality programs. In terms of region, Chengdu, as a central city in Southwest China, has a livable environment and active economic development, which has a certain appeal to candidates from Northeast China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical programs in Liaoning Province in 2026 will be approximately 5618, moving forward (easier admission) compared to 2025 (6264), mainly affected by the reduction in enrollment plan. The expected admission range is 5337 to 5899. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to actively apply.
